name: Paula Dennen
title: Managing Partner Physician
bio: Dr. Dennen earned her medical degree at University of Colorado Health Sciences Center in Denver, which was also the site of her residency and fellowship. She is board certified in Internal Medicine, Critical Care, Neuro-Critical Care Medicine, and Nephrology. Dr. Dennen is married and a world traveler.
education: University of Colorado Health Sciences Center, Denver, CO
residency: University of Colorado Health Sciences Center, Denver, CO
fellowship: University of Colorado Health Sciences Center, Denver, CO
